Name: Yew Chung International School of Hong Kong
Tagline: Seeking a top International School in Hong Kong? Through-train education for ages 6 months-18 years. Learn more!

Philosophy: YCIS Hong Kong has played a revolutionary role in developing education in Hong Kong. The school provides through-train, international education to expatriate and local children aged 6 months to 18 years old.
Outcomes: Students use their time at YCIS to improve and prepare for the future. Through career planning workshops and global university networking activities, our dedicated guidance counsellors provide individual and in-depth guidance to all students as they embark on the next steps in their lives.
Admissions: All admission related fees are listed clearly in our Admissions and Enrolment pack and on the Yew Chung International School Hong Kong (YCIS HK) website. These fees should be paid directly to the official accounts of YCIS HK.
Quote: Our unique Western and Chinese co-leadership model attracts top educators from around the world.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: YCIS Hong Kong campuses are more than places of education. They are places for students to grow with no boundaries.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Secondary campus has ten science labs, each equipped to deliver the range of sciences we teach.
Performance.Academic Integration: YCIS Hong Kong provides through-train international education to expat and local children aged 6 months - 18 years old. It offers international curriculum prepares students to become bilingually competent in English and Chinese and internationally minded for a competitive future.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Teachers at YCIS Hong Kong hold advanced degrees and IB certifications, with many possessing international teaching experience across Europe and Asia. Their bilingual proficiency enhances the delivery of a comprehensive, multicultural curriculum.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: YCIS Hong Kong graduates achieve high acceptance rates at top global universities, including Ivy League and Oxbridge institutions. Students consistently excel in IB exams, often scoring above the global average.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: YCIS Hong Kong employs a robust system of biannual progress reports and regular parent-teacher conferences to ensure student development. The school maintains accreditation with the Council of International Schools, ensuring adherence to global standards.
